title: Travel essentials
description: Useful words for transport, flights, and travel experiences.

items.meaning: to reserve a seat for a trip
items.example: I usually book a ticket online a few weeks before I travel.

items.meaning: the time or act of leaving
items.example: I always arrive early before departure.

items.meaning: the time or act of reaching a destination
items.example: The arrival time changed because of bad weather.

items.meaning: a small bag you take with you onto the plane
items.example: I keep my passport and charger in my carry-on bag.

items.meaning: to have an easy and pleasant trip
items.example: I prefer to travel comfortably, even if it costs a bit more.

items.meaning: to happen or arrive at the planned time
items.example: Public transport is much less stressful when it is on time.
